title: daucus carota subsp. major
intro: Daucus carota subsp. major is a large, cultivated variety of the wild carrot plant (Daucus carota), known for its edible root and medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Daucus carota subsp. major include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve overall health. The health benefits of consuming Daucus carota subsp. major include supporting eye health, immune function, and digestive system, as well as reducing the risk of certain cancers and heart disease. Daucus carota subsp. major can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as dried root, juice, tincture, and powder, which can be used to make teas, soups, and other dishes.
